arts.ttl: Claudio Lotito Lashes Out on Lazio Rivals: “Shouldn’t Be Allowed to Register in Serie A”
arts.sum: Lazio president Claudio Lotito brags about his club’s balanced financials while firing shots at some of his Serie A rivals. The Background As he often likes to remind us, the 67-year-old bought the Italian capital side in 2004 when the club was on the brink of bankruptcy. So while a large section of the fanbase […] The post Claudio Lotito Lashes Out on Lazio Rivals: “Shouldn’t Be Allowed to Register in Serie A” appeared first on The Laziali.
